plugins.name: rn-mvvm-guardian
plugins.description: Keep any React Native app faithful to MVVM + SOLID + best practices + conventions and scale it (screen-based → feature-based → modular monolith → micro-frontend). One stack- and structure-agnostic skill + agent (rn-mvvm-guardian), with a concrete Expo/TanStack instantiation as a copy-and-adapt worked example.
